ai.title: Ask the AI about Jie & this portfolio
ai.description: Ask about Jie's background, front-end work, project decisions, and how this portfolio was built.
ai.textModeDescription: Ask about experience, skills, project choices, engineering approach, or fit for a role.
ai.imageModeDescription: Upload a screenshot from this site or a related artifact and ask for portfolio-specific explanation or feedback.
ai.textPromptPlaceholder: Ask about Jie's experience, strengths, projects, technical choices, or working style...
ai.imagePromptPlaceholder: Explain what the screenshot shows and what you want to know about Jie's work or this portfolio...
ai.imageHelp: Use a portfolio screenshot, UI fragment, or related visual reference.
ai.textHint: Best for recruiter-style or project-specific questions.
ai.imageHint: Best for discussing portfolio visuals or implementation from screenshots.
ai.slowRequest: Response is slow — you can keep waiting or cancel
ai.verySlowRequest: Model is busy, waiting for response...
ai.empty: The answer will appear here. Try asking who Jie is, what he built, why a project was implemented a certain way, or what makes this portfolio credible.
ai.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while contacting the assistant.
ai.errorInputTooLong: Input is too long. Please shorten it before sending.
ai.errorConversationBusy: This conversation is still generating. Please wait a moment.
ai.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
ai.errorServiceUnavailable: AI service is busy. Please try again later.
ai.workspaceEmptyHint: Ask the AI to generate a project grid, timeline, or comparison table. Results will appear here.
ai.artifactPendingAppend: Preparing a new {artifact} for this thread.
ai.clearWorkspaceConfirm: Clear all artifacts in this workspace? Existing chat messages will stay.

hero.name: Jie
hero.shortIntro: Frontend developer specializing in robust web architecture and the deep integration of LLMs to build practical AI Agents.
